initial_entry.name: Copy Embed Code
initial_entry.author: dustinho
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Adds a 'Copy Embed Code' option to right-click context menu for images. Works in Live Preview and Reading Mode, including nested embeds.

initial_entry.author: Xabi
initial_entry.description: Right-click any file in the file explorer to copy it to the clipboard. Configurable: text files as text or raw file, images as PNG or raw file. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

initial_entry.name: Copy for Email
initial_entry.author: HWY1dot0
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Copy selections or whole notes as email-ready rich text. Tables, callouts, code and Mermaid diagrams survive pasting into Gmail, Outlook and Apple Mail; chat apps get clean plain text.
